title: DK Shivakumar to become India’s richest CM, overtaking Chandrababu Naidu
description: Sixty-four-year-old Shivakumar, also known as DKS, has declared a net worth of over ₹1,413 crore. DKS is all set to surpass Andhra Pradesh chief minister N Chandrababu Naidu, who is currently the richest chief minister with declared assets of about ₹931 Crore.
